---
title: "Profiling"
comments: false
toc: false
---

<p class="project-page-intro">
Profiling workflows for finding bottlenecks across Python, PyTorch operators,
CUDA kernels, memory allocation, and full CPU/GPU timelines.
</p>

<div class="project-stack">
  <!-- Add Nsight Systems GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Nsight Systems</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">System-wide CPU/GPU timelines, CUDA API traces, NVTX ranges, and utilization gaps</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add Nsight Compute GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">Nsight Compute</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Kernel-level metrics, occupancy, memory throughput, warp stalls, and source correlation</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add PyTorch Profiler GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">PyTorch Profiler</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Operator costs, CPU/CUDA activity, stack traces, tensor shapes, memory, and traces</span>
  </a>

  <!-- Add CUDA Memory Profiling GitHub repo URL here -->
  <a class="project-row-card" href="#" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="project-row-title">CUDA Memory Profiling</span>
    <span class="project-row-meta">Allocator snapshots, fragmentation, peak memory, and non-PyTorch allocation debugging</span>
  </a>
</div>
